system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Endurance against Medicine Skill TN
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You inhale deeply and release your Qi into a person afflicted with poison, pushing the venom from their body. On a Success the poison’s effect is delayed for 1 hour per level of Qi. This only works on natural poisons, not those rendered through Neigong Techniques. Cathartic: On a success the poison is effectively nullified and removed from the body. On a failure, the poison accelerates by one increment. Using this Cathartically temporarily depletes one Qi level for a day. This still also only works on natural poisons. Qixia uses Curing Palm to push venom from a Flying Phantom’s wound.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
